alt.description: alternative text (DocProperties.Description). Defaults to the source file name on add. Aliases: alttext, description.

contentType.description: OOXML content-type of the embedded image part (e.g. `image/png`, `image/jpeg`). Read from the package part referenced by the BlipFill embed relationship.
contentType.readback: MIME-style content-type string from the image part

fileSize.description: embedded image file size in bytes (length of the image part stream).
fileSize.readback: byte length of the embedded image part

relId.description: relationship id of the embedded image part (rId-style token). Required input for `get --save <path>` binary extraction.

src.description: image source (file path, URL, data-URI); accepted on add/set only. Get does NOT surface this key; the embedded relationship id is exposed under a separate Format["relId"] key.
src.readback: add/set-only input; not echoed by Get. Use Format["relId"] to inspect the embedded image relationship.
